title: Wayland window with wgpu
notes: Implemented WgpuState::new (async, Arc<Window>), render() clears to #0a0010, resize(). TextRenderer added wrapping ThermalTextRenderer. Rect type defined. main.rs updated with mod renderer + SessionManager smoke-test. NOTE: workspace wgpu downgraded from 24→23 to unify with glyphon 0.7; wgpu23 alias removed from thermal-core. cargo check passes.

title: Basic text rendering
notes: TextRenderer struct added to renderer.rs wrapping thermal_core::ThermalTextRenderer (glyphon 0.7 Cache/TextAtlas/Viewport pattern). make_buffer() and render_label() methods. ansi_color_to_rgba() and WgpuState::render_capture() also added here (task 5 merged). cargo check passes.

title: tmux session management
notes: Created session.rs with SessionManager::start() (TmuxSession + spawn up to min(max_panes,4) panes), pane_ids(), shutdown(kill). mod session added to main.rs with smoke-test. cargo check passes.

title: Capture single tmux pane
notes: Created capture.rs with PaneCapture::capture(), line_count(), char_count(). Uses session.capture_pane() and ansi::parse_ansi_styled(). mod capture added to main.rs. cargo check passes.

title: Render terminal text with thermal colors
notes: Added ansi_color_to_rgba() (Default→TEXT, Indexed→xterm-256 with 16-colour+cube+greyscale, Rgb→direct) and WgpuState::render_capture() in renderer.rs. Renders per-line with first-char colour. cargo check passes.

title: Pane grid layout engine
notes: Created layout.rs with LayoutEngine. compute_rects(): Grid (ceil(sqrt(N)) cols, 2px gaps), Sidebar (70/30 split), Stack (focused only). border_color(): SEARING for focused, COLD otherwise. set_focused() toggles Sidebar/Grid. pane_at() hit-tests rects. mod layout added to main.rs. cargo check passes.

title: Multi-pane capture + render
notes: Created conductor.rs with Conductor. poll() iterates pane_ids sequentially via PaneCapture::capture(), dirty detection by char_count diff. render_frame() computes rects, clears dirty flags (GPU draw calls wired in bare-metal winit loop). kill_pane() removes pane from all tracking. mod conductor added to main.rs. cargo check passes.

title: Input routing
notes: Created input.rs with InputHandler. handle(): Escape→Quit, Enter/Backspace/Tab/Arrows/chars→SendKeys, MouseInput(Left)→FocusPane, MouseWheel→Scroll±3. CursorMoved tracks position. mod input added to main.rs. cargo check passes.

title: Click-to-focus sidebar
notes: set_focused() and pane_at() implemented in layout.rs. Added handle_click(&mut layout) to InputHandler: calls layout.pane_at(cursor_pos), layout.set_focused(idx), updates focused_pane, returns FocusPane action. cargo check passes.

title: Agent state detection
notes: Added detected_to_agent() (DetectedState→AgentState bridge) and HookWatcher (notify::recommended_watcher + mpsc, watches hooks_dir recursively, drain_events() non-blocking) to state_detector.rs. cargo check passes.

title: Audio notifications
notes: Added StateTransitionAudio to audio.rs. on_state_change() checks prev_states HashMap: Any→Running=AgentStarted, Running/Thinking→Complete=AgentComplete, Any→Error=AgentError. First time a pane appears no sound plays. cargo check passes.

title: D-Bus service
notes: Created dbus.rs with ConductorInterface. zbus #[interface(name='org.thermal.Conductor')]: create_pane (stub), send_keys (no-op), get_pane_content (stub), focus_pane, set_layout, get_agent_state (stub). Properties: panes, active_pane, layout. mod dbus added to main.rs. cargo check passes.

title: thermal-ctl CLI
notes: Updated thermal_ctl.rs: List=tmux list-panes with ◉/○ icons; Capture=tmux capture-pane -p -e -S -{lines}; Send=tmux send-keys then Enter; Kill=tmux kill-pane; State=capture + prompt heuristic (IDLE/RUNNING); Create/Focus/Layout=stubs with D-Bus pending note. NotFound errors handled. cargo check passes.

title: Git diff awareness
notes: Created git_watcher.rs with GitWatcher. new() = notify recommended_watcher + mpsc + recursive watch. poll() drains events, filters Create/Modify, skips .git/ paths, deduplicates, returns new paths. clear() resets list. contains() checks starts_with(repo_root). mod git_watcher added to main.rs. cargo check passes.

title: Thermal HUD overlay
notes: Created hud.rs with HudData and HudRenderer. render_lines(): FPS top-right in WARM, AGENTS count top-left in TEXT, CPU temp with thermal color gradient, changed files bottom-left in HOT. is_scanline()=y%3==0. reticle_lines()=4 arms with 8px gap 20px length. mod hud added to main.rs. cargo check passes.

title: Phase 2: Direct PTY (replace tmux)
notes: Future: nix::pty::openpty, epoll multiplexing, alacritty_terminal Grid. Keep D-Bus API identical. No changes needed until Phase 2 begins — this is a future milestone.
